creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
There was an issue with package installation, that is now fixed with this
patch. A continuation command had a '@' in it, so @/usr/sbin/pw wasn't
found for adding user or group.

Attached is a patch that should be used in placement of the previously
submitted patch.

-jgh

-- 
Jason Helfman
System Administrator
experts-exchange.com
http://www.experts-exchange.com/M_4830110.html
